name: VoucherVault
desc: Django web application to store and manage vouchers, coupons, loyalty and gift cards digitally. Supports PWA, offline caching, expiry notifications, transactio…
descFull: Django web application to store and manage vouchers, coupons, loyalty and gift cards digitally. Supports PWA, offline caching, expiry notifications, transaction histories, file uploads and OIDC SSO.
